name: Stealth Browser
examples_zh: 在我负责的测试站点上验证 Cloudflare 挑战流程：使用持久会话登录，并截图记录每一步。
用有头浏览器访问我们的 DataDome 防护 QA 页面，完成登录回归测试并导出控制台日志。
为内部验证码兼容性环境运行检查，比较 undetected-chromedriver 与 Playwright stealth 的页面到达路径。
examples_en: On my own test site, validate the Cloudflare challenge flow with a persistent login session and screenshots for each step.
Use a headed browser against our DataDome-protected QA page, complete the login regression test, and export console logs.
Run checks in an internal CAPTCHA compatibility environment, comparing the page arrival paths for undetected-chromedriver and Playwright stealth.
